CustomField.formula: IF( TEXT( HOMEtracker__Property_Type__c) = "Independent Living Facility","Independent Living Facility", IF( TEXT( HOMEtracker__Property_Type__c) = "Assisted Living","Assisted Living", IF( TEXT(Special_Circumstances__c) = "Rehabilitation","Rehabilitation", IF(TEXT(Special_Circumstances__c) = "RCA","RCA", IF(TEXT(Special_Circumstances__c)="Special Needs","Special Needs " & TEXT( Rental_or_Sale_Development__c ), CASE(TEXT(Age_Restriction__c), "","Family ", "None","Family ", "Age Restricted ")& TEXT( Rental_or_Sale_Development__c ) )))))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The following fields on the Development determine this text: "Special Circumstances", "Age Restriction", "property type" and "Rental or Sale Development" all in the "Development Characteristics" section.
CustomField.label: Type of Units
